name: @carbide/msbuild-lite
description: Bounded .csproj parser for Carbide. Semantic port of src/cs-agent-tools/src/cs_kit/msbuild_lite.py — supports TFM/Nullable/LangVersion/ImplicitUsings/DefineConstants/AssemblyName/RootNamespace + Compile globs + PackageReference/ProjectReference capture + simple Condition evaluation.
